name: Daikyu
description: Daikyu takes great strength to draw back, but provides added power and range to every shot.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Daikyu takes great strength to draw back, but provides added power and range to every shot.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed numerous Skins not applying correctly to the Daikyu.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Daikyu not properly affecting the stat buff of Mecha Overdrive and Hunter Synergy Kubrow Mods, thus giving the player a much lower than expected Status/Crit Chance link. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1177050-daikyu-not-working-properly-with-mecha-overdrive/

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Daikyu with a skin equipped folding in the middle when unequipped and set to ‘Visible When Holstered’.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Daikyu FX issue as reported here:

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the quiver of the Daikyu clipping inside Nezha.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Amalgam Daikyu Target Acquired not applying lifesteal to Zaw Nikanas.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ballistica (Prime/Rakta), Cernos (Prime), Daikyu, Dread, and Paris Prime Energy color persisting as default on the strings.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the damage of the Daikyu in Conclave.
Daikyu ammo pool reduced to 15 in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Daikyu quiver clipping into the back of numerous Warframes.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Daikyu quiver clipping through the backs of numerous Warframes.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.6
patchlogs.fixes: Daikyu flight speed has been increased by 35% in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: The Soaring Strike Mod is no longer usable with the Attica or Daikyu in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of the Daikyu in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes: The Daikyu can now begin to charge another shot immediately after releasing the first, like all other bows.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the ammo pool of the Daikyu from 30 to 20 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Daikyu damage has been adjusted to one hit kill against the highest base EHP without +EHP mods in Conclave. (Requires Spring-Loaded Broadhead mod)

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Increase the audio FX for the Daikyu’s full draw.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.6 + 18.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Daikyu unintentionally breaking Ivara’s Prowl.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes:
Daikyu Conclave Skin
Charged projectile speed increased for Paris, Paris Prime, Daikyu and Cernos in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Daikyu making a firing sound before fully charged.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.8.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Ormolu Skins for your Daikyu, Akbolto, Bolto and Tipedo Weapons as well as the Ormolu Kyroptera Syandana will add an honorable brass and gold finish.
Fixed the Daikyu having no charge limit in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Daikyu killing the client if being drawn during a Host Migration.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Daikyu’s damage has been decreased in PvP.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Daikyu becoming locked in a full draw animation when sprinting.
Fixed Daikyu’s charged shots causing odd animations when turning to aim.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Daikyu bow being pulled and causing clipping issues while sprinting.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.2
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the draw radius and shot radius on Paris, Paris Prime, Cernos, and Daikyu. Before, players were able to hear you draw your bow from considerably far away distances that would give away your position.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Daikyu bow string not being properly placed in players hands until after initial shot.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.fixes:
Boltace Tonfa, Daikyu Bow and Atomos Particle Cannon available now!
Tenno, master three new additions to the Warframe Arsenal! Equip the Boltace tonfa, Daikyu bow or Atomos particle cannon to bring destruction to the enemy.
DAIKYU:  The Daikyu takes great strength to draw back, but provides added power and range to every shot.
